after_10th.title: Career Paths After 10th Standard
after_10th.description: Explore comprehensive career streams and specializations after completing 10th grade

degree_types.name: Diploma in Engineering (Polytechnic)
degree_types.description: Professional technical education leading to industry-ready skills

branches.name: Mechanical Engineering
branches.description: Study of mechanical systems, manufacturing, and energy

career_streams.name: Automobile Engineering
career_streams.description: Design, development, and maintenance of vehicles

career_streams.name: Production / Manufacturing Engineering
career_streams.description: Manufacturing processes, production planning, and optimization

career_streams.name: Thermal Engineering

career_streams.name: Design Engineering

career_streams.name: Mechatronics / Robotics

career_streams.name: Industrial Engineering

career_streams.name: Energy Engineering (Renewable & Conventional)
career_streams.description: Renewable energy, power generation, and energy conservation

career_streams.name: Aerospace Engineering

career_streams.name: Building Services Engineering
